programmes.show_description: All-Stars: Survivalists Vs. Predator. Two survivalists scavenge a nearby leopard's kill to get food. Matt Wright joins the other survivalists and causes a confrontation. S3, Ep7
All-Stars: Feeding Frenzy. The survivalists embark on several dangerous hunts to secure protein and prepare for their arduous extraction on the horizon. S3, Ep8
Teleshopping.

Teleshopping.
Drayton Mill Power Plant. The team compete against each other to see who can create the most unique piece from salvaged materials picked up at an abandoned power plant. S10, Ep7
Baltimore Fireboat. In Norfolk, VA, the crew salvages a fireboat from Baltimore. Back at the shop, a local coppersmith fashions unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke. S10, Ep8
Diver's Ed - Part 1. The Gold Ship crew strikes out on their own while Vernon is away. Shawn faces a malfunction on the Myrtle just as boss Dave Young comes to inspect it. S11, Ep13
Diver's Ed - Part 2. The Gold Ship crew strikes out on their own while Vernon is away. Shawn faces a malfunction on the Myrtle just as boss Dave Young comes to inspect it. S11, Ep14
Jarrod Crosbie. Paul Mackie's mine makeover team deal with hardship and heartbreak as they help up-and-coming prospector Jarrod Crosbie overcome a barrage of setbacks. S1, Ep5
The Trainee. Julia must remove a deadly snake from a frightened couple's garage. And Julia and trainee Conway deal with a constrictor snake near a youth centre. S1, Ep8
Bering Sea Swim Club. Skippers Sig and Phil try to re-exchange their deckhands in a high seas transfer. But when both fall into the freezing water it's a race to fish them out. S6, Ep4
Arctic Quest. The Skipper of the Northwestern becomes obsessive in his hunt for the fabled blue King crab. As a storm closes in, his crew start to doubt his sanity. S6, Ep5
Radio Silence. A dangerous run-in leads the team to an astounding new clue, but a communications breakdown leaves them in the dark about an approaching storm. S1, Ep5
Mayan Apocalypse. Josh Gates investigates the fall of the remarkable Mayan empire, unearthing human skulls and ancient sacrificial altars underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico. S1, Ep9
Secrets Of The Nazca. Investigating giant geoglyphs drawn into the earth by ancient Nazca tribes, Josh Gates flies to Peru to study newly-found lines and joins a psychedelic ritual. S1, Ep10
The Hill Of Death. The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. S1, Ep18
High And Dry. Amputee Jeff and wife Carol need a liveable home, water, and a place to grow food. The Raneys build an entire cabin from scratch and harness a natural spring. S2, Ep1
The Tunnel Rats risk their lives to get a massive digger under the ground. Meanwhile, the Blacklighters are amazed to unearth their largest piece of opal. S5, Ep4
The Bushmen's new worker faces a dangerous first day on the job. The Tarantos' overworked excavator grinds to a halt, and the Cheals are hit with more breakdowns. S5, Ep5
100% Injury Rate. The season's worst storm yet hits. Skipper Sean must choose between crab and an old friend. As injuries stack up one deckhand reveals a painful secret in his pants. S12, Ep6
Cold War. With Captain Edgar at the helm, the Northwestern is on the brink of mutiny. Drunk deckhands put the Saga at risk and Captain Johnathan gambles big to end his season. S12, Ep7
The county's air ambulance is called to a pedestrian hit by a car and a critically ill cardiac case. Plus, a woman suffers a freak accident. S2, Ep3
The paramedics treat a cyclist who may be paralysed and a farmer who's fallen off a barn roof. Plus, there's a tricky landing to help a holidaymaker. S2, Ep4
After two workers quit, the Dust Devils are forced to hire an 18-year-old rookie. Plus, the Poseidon Crew hope to end their season with a big nugget. S6, Ep20
All-Stars: Fight To The Finish. To finish the challenge, the survivalists must complete a brutal extraction across deadly killing fields of lions, crocodiles and leopards. S3, Ep9

Martinsville Burned House. The team head to Martinsville, VA, to salvage a house that was condemned after an electrical fire. They spot a granite counter with potential. S10, Ep9
Moneta Diner And Drive-in. The guys go to Moneta, VA, to salvage a diner and drive-in that were destroyed by a fire. Their priorities include a kiosk booth and a mobile stage. S10, Ep10
Crane Wreck. During an arctic storm, Cornelia Marie's crane comes off the rails causing injury and damaging equipment. But, this pales into insignificance when Sig gets a phone call. S15, Ep14
Devil's Cut. A Cornelia Marie deckhand suffers a devastating blow that requires emergency surgery at sea by Casey. Meanwhile, Captain Sig is left behind awaiting news from home. S15, Ep15
Unbreakable. The fleet deal with back-to-back unrelenting storms on the Bering Sea. Freddy attempts surgery on himself and the Summer Bay Crew receives news on Nick's future. S15, Ep16
Hell Or High Water. Another powerful winter storm hits as Monte returns to the Wizard after dealing with his dad's funeral arrangements. Plus, Jake is faced with a tough decision. S15, Ep17
Succession Of Opal Joe. The Blacklighters discover opalised sea creatures in an ancient seabed. The Cheals close in on their biggest opal haul ever, but all is not as it seems. S6, Ep8
A Glimmer Of Hope. The Mooka Boys attempt to reach a new mine on a treacherous opal field. Plus, the Blacklighters are almost buried alive mining opal in unstable tunnels. S6, Ep9
The Reward Of The Effort. The Opal Whisperers' partnership with veteran miner Uwe ends abruptly. The Misfits finally hit old timers' workings at the bottom of their open cut mine. S6, Ep10
Aqua Hues And Sapphire Blues. Patrick Gundersen's team tackles harsh terrain in the hunt for aquamarine. Plus, the Rubyvale Boys battle against mechanical malfunctions. S2, Ep1
Safety Thongs. Newcomer, Neil Wilkinson Jr., abseils down a deadly mineshaft in search of cubic fluorite, while Jarrin and Hugh take the plunge into frigid waters. S2, Ep2
Heart Of (Darwin) Glass. The Rubyvale Boys help a neighbour in need for a cut of the sapphire spoils. Tom heads to the Tasmanian mountains in search of meteorite-impact glass. S2, Ep3
The Poseidon Crew dodge bushfires. The Gold Gypsies go on a night-time detecting mission. Shane and Russell push their wash plant to breaking point. S5, Ep13
Marcus and Linden suffer an injury that could end their road trip. The Dust Devils attempt to produce the biggest gold pour of the season so far. S5, Ep14
The Poseidon Crew finally get permission to dig for gold in century-old mine shafts. And, the Gold Timers take a gamble on a new lease. S5, Ep15
Beyond Embarrassment. Hoarder Judy knows that if her suspicious neighbours call the authorities her home will be condemned. But how will she kick-start the painful purging process? S1, Ep2
Paralyzed By Clutter. Since her mum's death, Anne's hoarding has become obsessive and her son is now mimicking her odd behaviour. And does the 'Hat Lady of Omaha' really need help? S1, Ep3
Resurrected Woman In Ecuador. Shadow figures roam the halls of an abandoned manor. A couple encounters a local lake monster, and a dead woman comes back to life at her own funeral. S7, Ep8
Acadia Ranch Sanitorium. The crew go off the beaten path in Arizona to investigate an abandoned sanatorium. Dozens of deaths have left traces of suffering on the building. S20, Ep17
Henderson Hell House. The crew help a Nevada family experiencing sinister activity. They uncover the dark source of the psychological attacks hiding inside the home. S20, Ep18
